text:
Review round 2 report:
- MUST FIX: retry scheduler depends on Redis even though the design says v1 stays on Postgres.
- SHOULD FIX: clarify replay access controls.

input.question: Highest-impact unresolved finding: retry scheduler depends on Redis even though v1 stays on Postgres. What should we do?

options.label: Update design
options.description: Draft diffs that resolve this finding

options.label: Override this finding
options.description: Accept the risk and remove this finding from the must-fix list

options.label: Other / let me explain
options.description: Describe a different next step or nuance

text:
Old text → New text
- Old: "Queue retries through Redis-backed workers."
- New: "Persist retry jobs in Postgres and process them with an in-service worker for v1."

Apply this change? (yes / skip)
